item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
Sotto 0.1.1

  • New: Vocabulary keywords for Whisper — add words the model often gets wrong (names, brands, technical terms), separated by commas, in General settings
  • Translation is much more reliable — harder to confuse the model into refusing, echoing the source, or answering questions instead of translating
  • Loading indicator now appears in the pill and notch while transcription is processing
  • Whisper downloads no longer appear stuck at 100% — the model prewarm phase has its own status
  • Deleting a non-active model in the Models tab updates immediately

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
Sotto 0.1.0

First release of Sotto — the simplest voice dictation for macOS.

  • WhisperKit and Parakeet transcription engines
  • Aurora waveform visualization
  • Notch and floating pill indicator styles
  • Apple Intelligence polish and translate
  • 7 waveform color presets
  • Localized in 7 languages
